input.signal_brief: AI maturity score 2 with three named peers hiring MLOps in last 90 days.

candidate_output.subject: Question: your MLOps roadmap for 2026
candidate_output.body: Hi, three named peers posted senior MLOps roles in the last 90 days while your team has not publicly posted one. That may be intentional, or not yet scoped. If useful, I can share a concise peer pattern brief and discuss options in 15 minutes. Best, Yabi
